Hero.subtitle: Deploy VPN, storage, and remote desktop with one click. Manage your cloud server like a mobile app — no terminal required.

PainPoints.title: Managing servers
PainPoints.item1Desc: Setting up a VPN takes dozens of command-line steps. One typo and you start over.
PainPoints.item2Desc: SSL certificates, firewall rules, authentication systems — all on your own.
PainPoints.item3Desc: Every update risks breaking your services. Rolling back is a nightmare.

Solution.label: The Solution
Solution.title: Meet Passim
Solution.subtitle: Your Personal Cloud Butler
Solution.desc: One container, zero dependencies, automatic SSL. From install to usage — just one command.

Features.title: Core Features
Features.f1Desc: WireGuard VPN, WebDAV storage, remote desktop — just pick and click in the marketplace.
Features.f2Desc: No domain needed. Get Let's Encrypt certificates automatically via DNS reflection.
Features.f3Desc: Manage all your servers from one panel. Decentralized — no central server required.
Features.f4Desc: Support for Passkey fingerprint and face recognition. Secure and convenient.
Features.f5Desc: CPU, memory, network, disk at a glance. Built-in network speed test.
Features.f6Desc: One-click updates. Automatic rollback on failure. Your data is always safe.

Marketplace.title: Built-in App Marketplace
Marketplace.subtitle: 7 curated apps covering the most common use cases
Marketplace.l2tp: Classic VPN compatible with all devices

HowItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Copy the install script, paste it in your server terminal. Done in 30 seconds.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Enter your server address in a browser. SSL certificate is obtained automatically.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Pick a service from the marketplace, configure it, and deploy with one click.

TechStack.title: Open Source · Modern · Reliable
TechStack.desc: Built on a modern tech stack. Single Go binary, zero external dependencies.

QuickStart.title: Quick Start
QuickStart.note: Supports self-signed certificates, Let's Encrypt, and custom domain SSL modes.

Footer.tagline: Making cloud management simple for everyone
